name: Sodium electrolytes
summary: Decision-ready summary: Sodium electrolytes is best framed for sweat replacement; endurance hydration; rehydration; safety screen: hypertension; heart failure; kidney disease; sodium restriction.
description: Sodium-containing electrolytes help maintain plasma osmolarity and fluid balance during heat or exercise; practical value centers on hydration support.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: hypertension or sodium-sensitive blood pressure without clinician guidance
congestive heart failure due to risk of volume overload and decompensation
chronic kidney disease due to impaired sodium excretion and fluid retention
cirrhosis or liver disease with ascites due to fluid-retention risk
concurrent corticosteroid medication due to additive sodium and fluid retention
